On November 13, 2012, Aon plc (the Company) issued a press release announcing that it has commenced a private offer to exchange certain of Aon Corporations outstanding junior subordinated debentures for a combination of new debt securities issued by the Company and cash.

On January 25, 2012, Aon Corporation, a Delaware corporation (the Company), established the date for a special meeting of its stockholders to consider and vote on the previously announced Agreement and Plan of Merger and Reorganization, dated as of January 12, 2012 (the Merger Agreement) with Market Mergeco Inc., a newly-formed Delaware corpora

Aon  Hewitt Merger   As previously announced, on July 11, 2010, Aon Corporation, a Delaware corporation (Aon) entered into an Agreement and Plan of Merger (the Merger Agreement) with Hewitt Associates, Inc., a Delaware corporation (Hewitt), pursuant to which Hewitt agreed to merge with a wholly owned subsidiary of Aon (the Merger).

On August 24, 2010, Aon Corporation (Aon) and Hewitt Associates, Inc. (Hewitt) issued a joint press release (the Press Release) announcing that the waiting period under the Hart-Scott-Rodino Antitrust Improvements Act of 1976, as amended, relating to Aons previously announced proposed merger with Hewitt has expired, thereby satisfying a cond

July 12, 2010, Aon Corporation (Aon) issued a joint press release with Hewitt Associates, Inc. (Hewitt) announcing the execution of an Agreement and Plan of Merger, dated as of July 11, 2010, by and among Aon, Alps Merger Corp., a wholly-owned subsidiary of Aon, Alps Merger LLC, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Aon, and Hewitt.

On June 24, 2009, Aon Corporation (Aon) issued a press release (the Press Release) announcing the pricing by its indirect, wholly-owned subsidiary Aon Financial Services Luxembourg, S.A. (the Issuer) of the Issuers offering of 500 million of its 6.25% Guaranteed Notes due July 1, 2014 (the Notes).

November 19, 2008, Aon Corporation (Aon) issued a press release (the Aon Press Release) announcing that it has obtained the antitrust, competition and regulatory approvals and consents so as to enable it to complete the acquisition of Benfield Group Limited (Benfield) by Aon Benfield (Bermuda) Ltd., an indirect wholly-owned subsidiary of Aon,
October 15, 2008, Aon Corporation (the Company) issued a press release announcing the signing of a definitive agreement to sell its AIS Management Group unit to Mercury Insurance Group.
On August 22, 2008, Aon and Benfield issued a joint press release (the Press Release) in the United States announcing the Acquisition.

As described in the Press Release, Aon intends to extract a one-time cash dividend of $325 million from CICA prior to the close of its sale of CICA.
July 31, 2007, the Company also issued a press release (the CICA Press Release) announcing that it is considering strategic options for Combined Insurance Company of America and its subsidiaries.

January 29, 2007, Aon Corporation (the Company) issued a press release (the Press Release) announcing that it has completed the acquisition of Footman James from Alchemy Partners (Guernsey) Limited.

October 25, 2006, Aon Corporation (the Company) issued a press release announcing it has signed a letter of intent to sell its Construction Program Group, a managing general underwriter, to Old Republic Insurance Company.

November 15, 2005, Aon Corporation (the Company) issued a press release announcing that it is exploring strategic alternatives with respect to its warranty, credit insurance and property & casualty underwriting businesses.
Press Release announcing: (i) its results of operations for the quarter and nine months ended September 30, 2005; and (ii) the approval by its Board of Directors of a stock repurchase program.

September 22, 2005, Aon Corporation (the Company) issued a press release announcing the signing of a definitive agreement to sell Swett & Crawford, the Companys U.S.-based wholesale broking operation, to an investor group including Hicks, Muse, Tate & Furst Incorporated, Banc of America Capital Investors and Emerald Capital.

On March 4, 2005, Aon Corporation issued a press release announcing the execution of the Settlement Agreement.

December 6, 2004, Aon Corporation (the Company) issued a press release responding to recent press reports about the investigation of the insurance industry by the New York Attorney Generals office and others.
